title: Obsidian template variables not rendering on iPad
first_prompt: Why isn’t my template completing the variables in Obsidian. This is on my iPad.
summary: Irwin was attempting to troubleshoot why Obsidian template variables, particularly those managed by the Templater plugin, were failing to render correctly when using the application on an iPad. The conversation evolved from a general query about execution failure to a focused technical diagnosis, where the assistant advised checking two specific settings within Obsidian: enabling the "Trigger Templater on new file creation" setting and verifying the designated "Template folder location."
